name: broad-infinite-list
desc: A high-performance, bidirectional infinite scroll list component for large list rendering, support React/Vue/Expo. Use case: smoothly chat history, news feed u…
descFull: A high-performance, bidirectional infinite scroll list component for large list rendering, support React/Vue/Expo. Use case: smoothly chat history, news feed updates, or stream logs in both directions without layout shifts. Best for large scroll list.
